homepage.tagline.message: Applied Process Analysis And Modeling Laboratory

homepage.title.message: APAAM Lab - Applied Process Analysis And Modeling Laboratory

homepage.description.message: Applied Process Analysis And Modeling Laboratory - Focus on innovative solutions in computational mechanics and materials science

homepage.feature1.description.message: Research and application of numerical methods such as FEM, DEM, MPM to solve complex engineering problems.

homepage.feature2.description.message: Advanced modeling techniques including CT-based particle reconstruction, shape characterization, and contact detection.

homepage.feature3.description.message: Intelligent solutions based on deep learning for material parameter identification and structural health monitoring.

homepage.news.item2.message: Prof. Lai joined the School of Civil Engineering at Sun Yat-sen University
